title: stephaniscus gabonensis
intro: Stephaniscus gabonensis, also known as African gum, is a plant species belonging to the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in African medicine to treat various ailments, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Stephaniscus gabonensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
